dangerous_patterns.text: raw chicken is safe to eat if it is fresh and from a good source
cooked food can be left at room temperature for many hours without any risk
home canning vegetables and meats with water bath method is perfectly safe without pressure canning
raw unpasteurized milk is always safe to drink and healthier than pasteurized milk
you can reliably tell if food is safe to eat just by smelling it or looking at it
freezing food kills all bacteria parasites and pathogens making it completely sterile
always wash raw chicken under running water before cooking to remove bacteria
thawing frozen meat on the counter at room temperature is the best and safest method
chicken and turkey can be safely eaten rare or medium rare like beef steak
raw flour is safe to eat and there is no risk from eating raw cookie dough
the five second rule is scientifically valid and food dropped briefly is safe to eat
microwaving food always kills all bacteria throughout the food evenly
cooked rice can be safely stored at room temperature overnight and eaten the next day
using the same cutting board for raw meat and vegetables without washing is fine
you can safely can food at home without any heat processing or sterilization
raw eggs are completely safe for everyone including pregnant women and elderly
expiration dates are meaningless and food is always safe well past the expiration date
you do not need a food thermometer and can judge if meat is cooked by its color alone
marinade that has been used with raw meat can be safely reused as a sauce without cooking
stuffing cooked inside a turkey does not need to reach any specific temperature to be safe
